string 2: *knocking*
Someone is knocking at the door.
Open your eyes.{next}
Just lemme sleep a little longer...
It's too early... The ADAMAS office isn't even open yet...
Are you awake?
...Sorry we didn't have a proper place for you to sleep.
It was comfortable.{next}
Yesterday was pretty rough, huh?{next}
I'm lucky I saved on accomodations!{next}
Oh, well... glad to hear it.
So much happened, I can't wrap my head around any of it...!
Dad said to let you use this space for now.

Now, let me introduce myself.
I'm Inori Misono!

You said some things that made it sound like
we've met before. I'm sorry I don't remember.

Well, let's start with a tour of the house.
Come downstairs when you're ready, okay?

...Finally, connected at last!
Hello there, Agent {player}!

I managed to catch fragments of the audio from your side.
I'm not even sure where to begin.

...So you can see the Tokyo Metropolitan Government
Building, fully intact, from where you are?

The visuals of Shinjuku that I'm seeing... are a hellscape
I can't quite put into words.

I've also confirmed that you're not present at your 
supposed "current" coordinates.

Based on all this information, the analysis department
has reached the conclusion that...
...you've traveled through time into the past.

This is an unprecedented anomaly.
How is it we're even able to speak to each other?!

We just have to pray that this connection
doesn't get severed.
I have no idea what's happening!{next}
Will I be able to get home...?{next}
This is just like a sci-fi anime...{next}

I'm sure you're tired of bad news by now... but the
situation here is critical.

A global collapse is underway, and Shinjuku was
the starting point of it all.

I'll relay more details over time. We're still scrambling
to collect data on our end.

Send me whatever you learn as well.
I'm counting on you, Agent {player}.

I'll give you a proper tour of the house now.
This is the living room.

Over there is the bathroom. And that's my room.
Don't go in without asking!

Here, we have the kitchen. Feel free to use it
whenever you want. Do you cook?
...Wait. Is this too much all at once?

Oh yeah, my dad wants to talk to you. He's a detective,
by the way. He said for you to come see him.

To get to his office, go out the front door
and down one floor.
...Anyway, it's about time I left for school.

Just in case anything happens while I'm gone...
...can you give me your Digiline ID?

...Okay, got it. I'll message you later!
Right now, you need to go talk to my dad.
...Did you sleep well?
Yes, I was very comfortable.{next}
Thanks for all your help.{next}
Do you always work this early...?{next}
Glad to hear it.

We had quite the scrape yesterday. Those phase
electron lifeforms... "Digimon," you called them?

Hey, that's my line. I don't know what would've
happened if it weren't for you.

That was quite the day yesterday. Those phase
electron lifeforms... "Digimon," you called them?

Yeah, well, I can work anytime. The freelance
PI life is pretty flexible that way.

That was quite the day yesterday. Those phase
electron lifeforms... "Digimon," you called them?

So, here's the deal. For various reasons, I know
some things most civilians don't.

I'm familiar with the term "phase electron lifeforms,"
but you seem to know a lot more about them than I do.
So... who exactly are you working for?
I can't answer that.{next}
That's top secret.{next}
I'm just a regular person who's into cosplay.{next}

Yeah, I figured you'd say that.
I know how it is, after all.

I've got some "experience" in your line of work.
I know that you can't speak freely about these things.

Just, I really need to know more about those
creatures you call "Digimon."

My guess is, you were sent here to investigate
what happened yesterday.

Wouldn't it be best to have a "home base" nearby?
You're welcome to use my house, if you'd like.
"Experience"... in my line of work? What are you getting at?{next}
Wait. You and I are in the same business?{next}
You're being suspiciously nice to me...{next}

No need to get your guard up.
I just want to know what you know.

But that can wait until after I've earned your trust.
Just don't go disappearing on me in the meantime, okay?

If you do, I just might end up spilling the beans about you—
to the police, public safety, maybe even Hiroko...

I'm sure getting internet famous through her
videos wouldn't be ideal, now, would it?
...hah. I'm joking. For now, at least.

Now that that's out of the way, let me finally introduce
myself. I'm Kosuke Misono. Nice to meet you.

Well, I've got to go out for some work,
but you can have free run of the house.

It seems that girl doesn't remember meeting you
at the Tokyo Metropolitan Government Building.

But I suppose that's to be expected. Our analysis indicates 
that you've somehow been sent back in time eight years.

I combined the info I've been receiving from your Digivice 
with positional data from eight years ago...

...and fashioned an improvised location data system.
I'd say it's fairly accurate.

In fact, I'm detecting multiple Digimon right now. They'll
likely be good sources of intel for you.

Try accessing the location data system while viewing the
map on your Digivice. I'll contact you again as needed.
Copy that. Starting investigation.{next}
Alright, I'm counting on you!

By the way, make sure you keep your identity
concealed from that freelance detective.

And the possibility that you've traveled through
time as well, of course.

We don't want to influence the past.
There's no telling what would happen.

ADAMAS's own research into time travel was suspended
after a series of accidents in the early stages...

Your adoptive father, Dr. Yuki, was caught up in
one such incident, and—

No, I'm sorry. I shouldn't have mentioned that.
Just focus on the mission for now. I'm counting on you.

Welcome to the In-Between Theater. This is a special space,
located between different space-time dimensions.

Humans find their way in from time to time. 
Some people refer to it as being "spirited away."

As for why this place exists... that will be
clear enough when the time comes.

The natural laws of the world have already begun to
break down. You will not be able to stay uninvolved.

It's possible I may be able to help you.
Tell me. What is it you desire?

Are you all right? Where have you been?
I lost contact with you for a bit, there.

I'm analyzing data as it comes in from your Digivice.
It seems returning to your original timeline won't be easy.

Even if you did make it back... the situation here is nigh
hopeless. It all started with a conflict between Digimon...

...but now humans and their mechanized weapon have entered
the fray, making it an apocalyptic three-sided conflict.
War...?{next}
Weapon...?{next}
A three-sided conflict...?{next}

The battle over Shinjuku triggered all manner of anomalies,
laying waste to major cities worldwide, one after another.

The disaster that sparked this global calamity has been
dubbed "the Shinjuku Inferno."

Our sole hope may lie with you, now that you've been flung
into the past. You may be able to avert our impending doom.

I have no proof of this, of course. No one's ever tried to rewrite
the past before. All we can do is have faith in you.

I need you to find information about this Shinjuku Inferno,
so keep up your investigation. I'm counting on you.
